tech.prefix: Social Network -> Coordination Engine -> Real-World Demand

tech.prefix: The stack starts with human signals
tech.text: The stack starts with human signals and ends with real actions: access, introductions, reservations, room keys, tips, purchases, deposits, t
Intent appears on Nostr. OpenClaw matches people and places. Crays sends the introduction or venue action. Booking rails execute when needed
External booking infrastructure such as Amadeus can be treated as execution only: availability, pricing and ticketing after Crays has alread
Crays builds the infrastructure that translates intention into economic activity.
Users are matched automatically. Demand is generated instead of searched for. Payments happen directly. Venues become intelligent local netw
